description: 3-email sequence to win back cold subscribers

emails.subject: Still interested in [TOPIC]?
emails.preview_text: Quick check-in (no hard feelings either way)
emails.body:
Hey,

Noticed you haven't opened an email in a while.

No judgment. Inboxes get overwhelming.

But I want to make sure I'm only emailing people who actually want to hear from me.

Quick question: Are you still interested in [TOPIC/NICHE]?

**If yes:** Just click this link and you'll keep getting my best stuff:
[STAY SUBSCRIBED LINK]

**If no:** No action needed. I'll remove you from the list in a few days.

Either way, thanks for being here.

[Name]

emails.subject: Did you see this?
emails.preview_text: My most popular piece from the last 3 months
emails.body:
In case you missed it, here's what people loved most recently:

[BEST PERFORMING CONTENT TITLE]
[BRIEF DESCRIPTION]
[LINK]

This got [X views/shares/comments] because [reason it resonated].

If this looks interesting, you might want to stick around. I send stuff like this every week.

[STAY SUBSCRIBED LINK]

If not your thing, no worries. I'll clean up the list soon.

[Name]

emails.subject: Goodbye (unless...)
emails.preview_text: Last email unless you want to stay
emails.body:
This is the last email you'll get from me.

I'm removing inactive subscribers today. You're on that list.

If you want to stay:
[STAY SUBSCRIBED BUTTON]

If you don't click, you'll be unsubscribed automatically. No hard feelings.

Here's what you'd miss:
- Weekly breakdowns of what's working in [NICHE]
- Real numbers from my projects
- Tools and templates I use

Your call.

[Name]

P.S. If you stay, reply and tell me what you'd like me to cover. I'll prioritize it.
